title: Snowflake Native-Pull Validation Assets
scope_summary: Documents the scope and execution order of Snowflake native-pull validation assets, clarifying ownership boundaries between Terraform-managed platform objects, dbt-managed gold models, and legacy bootstrap SQL retained as reference. Serves as orientation for developers deploying or validating the Snowflake native-pull path.
key_constraints: Terraform owns: storage integration, S3 import path, run-manifest auto-ingest objects, refresh-status table, manifest stream, source-side load wrapper, and public gold refresh wrapper
dbt project owns: curated gold models, dynamic tables, and the EDGARTOOLS_GOLD_STATUS view
SQL files under bootstrap/ are no longer the deployment mechanism — retained as reference only
